nasb.text: Then Moses spoke in the hearing of all the assembly of Israel the words of this song, until they were complete:

esv.text: Then Moses spoke the words of this song until they were finished, in the ears of all the assembly of Israel:

cnv.text: 於是摩西把這首詩歌的話，都說給以色列的全體會眾聽，直到說完了。

ccb.text: 然后，摩西把这首诗歌读给以色列全体会众听。
